channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overgrown shrubs & trees making access along the pathway difficult and dangerous, 14th March
item.description:
Overgrown shrubs & trees making access along the pathway difficult and dangerous
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paradise Path, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Same Volvo parked illegally - reported many times, 14th March
item.description:
This resident at Pynfolds Estate parks illegally several times a week. This has been reported several times, including to the Council. We left notes on their car. They do not care and happily park where it pleases. Today they make manoeuvring out of the car park, again, difficult. Why are they not getting a warning since this is a regular occurrence evidences with pictures?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A lot of rubbish dumped, 14th March
item.description:
A lot of rubbish dumped
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hampstead Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A lot of rubbish outside back of Woolwich poly school for girls, 14th March
item.description:
A lot of rubbish outside the back of Woolwich poly school for girls and the playfield a lot of rubbish blowing around
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hutchins Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped transit curtain side box van, 14th March
item.description:
Dumped van basically a wreak.. Must have been parked for years.. Someone's dragged it and dumped it on half path half road...if it was dragged more than a few 100 metres I'd be amazed.. 1 horsebox 1 caravan and 1 dumped van In road now...
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Old Maidstone Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard Dislodged, 14th March
item.description:
The black safety bollard that protects pedestrians crossing at the top of Cedar Avenue junction with Burnt Oak Lane has been dislodged. Please can you arrange for this to be replaced or reset.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 261, Burnt Oak Lane, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous broken street sign, 14th March
item.description:
A street sign has been vandalised and it now hangs dangerously over the path. My ten year old nearly walked into it and it has sharp edges , it could have caused a serious injury. I have tied to move it round to a less dangerous angle but it is at head height. Please could this be prioritised as it is very close to a school and nursery.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rectory Field Crescent, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of litter along Sevenoaks way, and under bridge and arround billboard sign, 14th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Avenue, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Lots of litter and food waste along the alley way attracting rats!!, 14th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Cray Avenue, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Untaxed and mot van, 14th March
item.description:
Park up for last 4 days in a bay for unloading and loading. Thom line 20 minutes return back 2 hours. Ower of van has stall out side Pound land and parking wardens just walk by not booking the van
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 211 - 213, High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: 1)Stop line faded A, B, C faded - required repainting 2)Pedestrian stud faded on D phase - required repainting, 14th March

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missed bin collection, 14th March
item.description:
Hello, our blank rubbish bins have not been collect and the bins are over flooding now. Can the council advise us on where to put the waste. If we leave it on the floor, the foxes with rip the bags apart. Is there any idea when waste disposal will be coming, we’ve already called the council and was told it will come 2 days ago but still no sign.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Minard Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian stud faded on D phase- required repainting Stop line faded on A, B phase - required repainting, 14th March
item.description:
Pedestrian stud faded on D phase- required repainting Stop line faded on A, B phase - required repainting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Friern Barnet Road, Brunswick Park, Greater London
